body:
Frank — attaching the updated savings timeline and both lease sheets ahead of Monday. Talk soon.

Cynthia
subject: Re: Rootstock plan — lease numbers

body:
Hi — following up on the 40-seat space on Newark Ave. Could I come walk it Monday afternoon? I'd want to see the kitchen rough-in and the gas line before I get my hopes up.

Cynthia Thornton
subject: Newark Ave space — Monday walkthrough?

body:
Greenfield — do you have any of the early peaches coming in next week? Thinking about a stone-fruit special and I'd rather build it around yours than market stuff.

Cynthia
subject: Early peaches?

body: Hey Luis — prep list for Saturday once I lock the specials. Hold the fava work for me, I want to walk Dani through the puree.
subject: Saturday prep

body: Mom — can't make it Tuesday but I'll be there Sunday for sure. Tell Grandma I want the pot roast recipe written down properly this time, the margin notes in the binder are killing me.
subject: Sunday

body:
Hi — interested in the walk-in cooler you have listed. Is it still available and what are the dimensions? I'm building out a small restaurant kitchen and trying to source used equipment that's been maintained.

Cynthia Thornton
subject: Used walk-in cooler — still available?

body:
Fontana — the washed-rind from last week was incredible, put it on the cheese course Friday and it sold out. Can I get two more wheels in the next order? Also curious if you'll have anything new from the goat herd this summer.

Cynthia
subject: More of the washed-rind

body: Tony — bringing the new amaro I found to Monday, you have to try it in something. Also I owe you for last week.
subject: Monday

body:
Hi — registering for the summer module on restaurant financial modeling. Do I need to finish the unit on lease negotiation first or can I jump ahead? Short on time and want to use it well.

Cynthia Thornton
subject: Course module order

body:
Gianna — the produce order for next week is in. Heads up I bumped the tomato quantity, the heirlooms have been moving fast on the specials. Numbers attached.

Cynthia
subject: Next week's order

body:
Hi — following up on my application interest. Still building toward opening but I wanted to introduce myself early since you do a lot of small first-time operators. Concept is seasonal American, 40 seats, hyper-local sourcing.

Cynthia Thornton
subject: Intro — Rootstock concept

body: Gina — yes to coffee. Also I found Grandma's old gravy recipe and I think the proportions in the binder are wrong, the flour to fat is off. Want to test it together?
subject: Re: Lucas + this weekend

body:
Hi — interested in the Fulton Fish Market standing wholesale account for when I open. What's the minimum order and do you deliver to Jersey City? Trying to plan the seafood program now.

Cynthia Thornton
subject: Wholesale account question

body: Frank — thinking about the open-kitchen layout vs. closing it off for cost. Gut says open, it's the whole point, but I want your read on the insurance and noise side before I commit on paper.
subject: Open kitchen — your read

body:
Harborside — the single-origin you roasted last month was the best pour-over I've had in a while. Saving a bag for the restaurant's coffee program when I get there. Can you do a wholesale conversation down the line?

Cynthia
subject: That single-origin
